allow: Bash(PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT=8 PGPASSWORD='ma1orieS' psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select count\(*\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select column_name||' '||data_type from information_schema.columns where table_schema='sprint' and table_name='sprint_d_richiesta_generica' order by ordinal_position;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select nome_colonna||' \('||count\(*\)||'\)' from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica group by nome_colonna order by nome_colonna;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select id||'|'||coalesce\(codice,''\)||'|'||descrizione||'|obs='||coalesce\(flg_obsoleto::text,''\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_TIPO_STRADA' order by ordine,descrizione;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select id||'|'||coalesce\(codice,''\)||'|'||descrizione||'|obs='||coalesce\(flg_obsoleto::text,''\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_SEDIME' order by ordine,descrizione;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select id||'|p='||coalesce\(fk_padre::text,''\)||'|c='||coalesce\(codice,''\)||'|'||descrizione||'|tip='||coalesce\(tipologia,''\)||'|obs='||coalesce\(flg_obsoleto::text,''\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_CATEGORIA' order by ordine,descrizione limit 12;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select 'codice='||coalesce\(codice,'NULL'\)||' n='||count\(*\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_CATEGORIA' group by codice order by codice;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select 'flg='||coalesce\(flg_straordinario::text,'NULL'\)||' n='||count\(*\) from sprint.sprint_t_evento group by flg_straordinario;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select 'CAT_nonobs='||count\(*\) from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_CATEGORIA' and codice='CAT' and coalesce\(flg_obsoleto,0\)=0;")

Bash(psql -h tst-domdb67.csi.it -p 5432 -U sprint -d PGSITTST -tA -c "select id::text||'='||descrizione from sprint.sprint_d_richiesta_generica where nome_colonna='FK_TIPO_STRADA' and coalesce\(flg_obsoleto,0\)=0 order by ordine nulls last, descrizione;")
